name: Composer Staff (Major)
description:
A composer staff is short and shaped like an elegant black conductor's baton with a silver tip. When waved through the air, it hums melodically. In this way, you can play it as though it were an instrument, and it grants a +2 item bonus to Performance checks made with it.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip ,
  • 1st
  • 2nd
  • 3rd , ,
  • 4th
  • 5th ,

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells.
